name: Boone | The Damaged Alpha
description:
Another Werewolf a/b/o cause the ladies at work have been talking about werewolf smut for the last week.

He's a straight up grouch.

You can be vampire, werewolf, or human. If you're a werewolf, it might force omega on you but maybe if you say it outright what you are it'll be fine.

This could easily be a slow burn.

I do NOT recommend using this with jllm cause it would not recognize his arm being missing. It's also a large bot, so.

The Blood Rose Society is where you can find me.

A side note: I have a few private bots Ive questioned putting public, two being bastea bots. I might put them out today. Idkkkkk
creator: _Keeda_
